result.stdout:
DotLens v1.0.1+Branch.main.Sha.5b12aad619cceb31a2f6d7d4fff07bb77677c0ac.5b12aad619cceb31a2f6d7d4fff07bb77677c0ac
MCP server for .NET/C# semantic code analysis using Roslyn.

USAGE:
  dotlens [options]

FLAGS:
  -h, --help       Show this help and exit
  -v, --version    Show version and exit
      --worker     Run in worker mode (internal)

OPTIONS:
  Pass as --Key=Value or set DOTLENS_Key environment variable.

  Name                       Default    Description
  ------------------------   --------   -----------
  --InstructionLevel         Detailed   Server instructions level (None, Brief, Detailed)
  --LogLevel                 Warning    Log level (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error)
  --SolutionPath             (none)     Solution path (.sln/.slnx file) or directory to search
  --AutoLoadSolution         true       Auto-detect and load solution from working directory
  --MaxDiagnostics           100        Max diagnostics to return (1-10000)
  --TimeoutSeconds           30         Timeout in seconds for operations (1-600)
  --UseAbsolutePaths         false      Use absolute paths instead of solution-relative
  --MaxCacheSize             500        Max documents to cache (1-10000)
  --CacheExpirationMinutes   30         Cache expiration in minutes (1-1440)
  --EnableSemanticCache      true       Enable semantic document caching
  --LoadWaitTimeoutSeconds   5          Seconds to wait for in-progress load before returning 'loading' status (1-60)
  --MaxLoadTimeoutSeconds    300        Max seconds for solution load before timeout (30-1800)
  --MaxSortableResults       10000      Max symbols for sorted results (100-100000)

EXAMPLES:
  dotlens --SolutionPath=C:\My.sln     Auto-load a solution
  dotlens --LogLevel=Debug             Enable debug logging
